title: koeleria riguorum
intro: Koeleria riguorum, also known as mountain hair grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Koeleria riguorum is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Koeleria riguorum may be consumed as teas, infusions, or dried powders, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
